objective: Add an accessible dashboard empty-state card when there are no projects.
in_scope: Title, short description, and primary Create project link
constraints: Keep the existing dashboard layout for non-empty project lists
Use accessible link text and semantic markup
acceptance_criteria: Empty project list renders title, description, and Create project link
Non-empty project list still renders project cards
assumptions: Dashboard project data is available in app/dashboard/page.tsx or adjacent loader
